scenes.text: I kept this old recipe card for twenty years.

scenes.text: But every time I hold it, I can smell her kitchen.

scenes.text: The sound of the radio playing boleros. The way she hummed while she stirred.

scenes.text: She passed when I was twelve. I never got to tell her that her food was the only thing that made Sundays feel like home.
scenes.image_prompt: Empty kitchen chair at a wooden table, single plate setting, sunlight streaming through lace curtains, deeply emotional, cinematic lighting, loneliness and memory
